name: KANGLASHA - Guardian of Roots | Oversized Tee
desc: Sacred guardian of Kangla Fort — symbol of protection, authority, and identity. Built for bold presence with structured oversized silhouette.
lore:
Kangla Sha is not just a creature — it is a gatekeeper of power.
Standing at the ancient Kangla Fort, it has witnessed kings rise, kingdoms fall, and history reshape itself.

This design captures that silent dominance — not loud, not chaotic, but unshakable.

The sharp edges, the stance, the symmetry — everything reflects authority without needing to prove it.

This is not fashion. This is presence.
details:
• 240–260 GSM Premium Terry Cotton
• Oversized drop-shoulder fit
• High-density screen print
• Breathable + structured drape
• Built for daily wear + statement styling

⚠️ Check size chart before ordering. Oversized fit — do not assume your regular size.
wash:
• Machine wash cold (inside-out)
• Do not bleach
• Do not iron directly on print
• Dry in shade (prevents fading)
• Avoid high heat drying

name: KHAMBA - Kao Trial Edition | UT27
desc: Inspired by Khamba Na Kao Phaba — where strength meets calm, and control defeats chaos.
lore:
When the raging Kao was unleashed, it was not just a battle of strength — it was a test of spirit.

Khamba did not fight the bull with fear. He faced it with control.

This design captures that moment — tension, movement, and raw force frozen in time.

The aggressive strokes represent chaos.
The central structure represents calm.

Because true power is not in dominance — it is in control.
details:
• UT27 Unisex Terry Oversized Tee
• Heavyweight premium cotton
• Sharp black knockout graphic
• Streetwear-ready silhouette
• Designed for durability + daily wear

⚠️ Check size before ordering. Oversized fit — size down if unsure.
wash:
• Wash inside-out
• Cold wash only
• No bleach
• Avoid direct ironing on design
• Air dry recommended

name: LAI KHUTSHANGBI - Phunga Wari Edition
desc: Inspired by childhood Phunga Wari — where fear lived in imagination and shadows had meaning.
lore:
In the quiet nights, when children gathered around the fire, stories were not told for entertainment — they were warnings.

Lai Khutshangbi was never clearly seen.

She existed in the corners. In the silence. In the fear of being watched.

This design reflects that imagination:
Blurred form.
Elongated presence.
Uncertain boundaries.

It is not what you see.
It is what you feel.
details:
• Premium oversized cotton tee
• Soft yet structured fabric
• High contrast horror silhouette design
• Inspired by oral folklore storytelling

⚠️ Important: Check size chart before ordering. Oversized fit.
wash:
• Wash inside-out
• Cold gentle cycle
• No harsh detergents
• Do not tumble dry high heat
• Dry in shade

name: LAI KHUTSHANGBI - She Reaches
desc: She does not knock. She reaches.
lore:
Lai Khutshangbi is known not by sight — but by reach.

Her arms extend beyond what should be possible.
Her presence arrives before she is seen.

This design focuses on that moment:
The stretch.
The tension.
The inevitability.

It is not chasing you.
It has already reached.
details:
• Oversized UT27 fit
• High-density black + red graphic
• Horror-inspired folklore streetwear

⚠️ Check size chart before ordering.
wash:
• Wash cold inside-out
• Do not iron print
• Hang dry preferred

name: SANGAI - Dancing Deer
desc: Symbol of balance — where every step is survival.
lore:
The Sangai does not run wildly.

It walks carefully — balancing on floating land that can collapse at any moment.

Each step is calculated.
Each movement is survival.

This design captures that fragile strength — where grace is not beauty, but necessity.
details:
• Oversized relaxed fit
• Soft breathable cotton
• Minimal + symbolic design
• Everyday wearable

⚠️ Check size chart before ordering.
wash:
• Cold wash
• Do not bleach
• Low heat iron (avoid print)
• Dry in shade

name: THANGAL - Warrior Legacy
desc: A tribute to Lungthoubu Thangal — strength, loyalty, and resistance.
lore:
Thangal was not born into greatness.

He earned it.

From guiding kings through unknown lands to standing firm against colonial power — his life was built on action, not title.

This design reflects discipline, structure, and resilience.

No excess.
No noise.
Just strength.
details:
• UT27 oversized fit
• Durable cotton build
• Strong minimal graphic identity
• Designed for everyday + statement wear

⚠️ Check size before ordering.
wash:
• Wash inside-out
• Cold water
• Avoid heavy machine drying
• Do not iron print

name: KHAMBA - Core Edition
desc: Embodiment of raw strength — stripped of excess, built on legacy.
lore:
Khamba is not loud.

His strength does not seek attention.
It exists — steady, unshaken, undeniable.

Rooted in courage and resilience, he stands as a symbol of quiet power.

No ornaments.
No distractions.

Just presence.
Just force.
details:
• Oversized relaxed fit
• Soft breathable cotton
• Minimal + bold identity
• Everyday wearable

⚠️ Check size chart before ordering.
wash:
• Cold wash
• Do not bleach
• Low heat iron (avoid print)
• Dry in shade

name: LAI KHUTSHANGBI - Concept V1
desc: The first reach — where presence begins to take form.
lore:
She does not arrive fully formed.

She reaches first.

Lai Khutshangbi exists between seen and unseen —
her presence defined by motion, by extension, by touch that never fully reveals itself.

This concept captures the beginning —
the moment something crosses into our world.

Incomplete.
Unsettling.
Watching.
details:
• Oversized relaxed fit
• Soft breathable cotton
• Concept experimental design
• Limited early drop

⚠️ Check size chart before ordering.
wash:
• Cold wash
• Do not bleach
• Low heat iron (avoid print)
• Dry in shade

name: SANGAI - Spirit Form
desc: A silent watcher — existing beyond sight, beyond certainty.
lore:
You do not see the spirit.

But it sees you.

The Sangai, in its spirit form, is not bound to land or body.
It moves between worlds — quiet, observing, present without proof.

Not every presence needs to be visible to be real.

Some things exist in stillness.

Some things are always there.
details:
• Oversized relaxed fit
• Soft breathable cotton
• Minimal + atmospheric design
• Everyday wearable

⚠️ Check size chart before ordering.
wash:
• Cold wash
• Do not bleach
• Low heat iron (avoid print)
• Dry in shade
